title: MDCAT 30-Day Starter Plan
steps: Revise one Biology topic daily.
Practice 20 English vocabulary items daily.
Attempt one mini mock every week.

title: MDCAT 90-Day Complete Roadmap
steps: Complete Biology, Chemistry and Physics topic cycles.
Revise English vocabulary and grammar daily.
Take weekly science mocks and monthly full mocks.

title: FAST 21-Day Quant Starter Plan
steps: Master percentages, ratios and averages.
Practice timed arithmetic daily.
Attempt one quantitative section mock every week.

title: NUST NET 45-Day Plan
steps: Revise math and physics formulas.
Practice intelligence questions daily.
Attempt one NET-style section mock every week.

title: NAT 14-Day Mixed Aptitude Plan
steps: Practice verbal, analytical and quantitative sections daily.
Revise common vocabulary and grammar errors.
Take two mixed mocks before test day.

title: GAT General 30-Day Plan
steps: Build verbal reasoning through vocabulary and reading.
Practice quant and data interpretation on alternate days.
Attempt weekly full pattern mocks.

title: LAT 20-Day Law Admission Plan
steps: Practice English grammar and reading daily.
Write short essay outlines twice a week.
Revise legal aptitude and general knowledge.

title: IELTS 28-Day Band Improvement Plan
steps: Practice reading main idea and inference questions.
Write one Task 2 outline every alternate day.
Record speaking responses and review fluency.

title: SAT 30-Day English and Math Plan
steps: Alternate English and math practice days.
Review grammar rules and data questions.
Attempt weekly SAT-style mixed mocks.
